title: How to Perform Automatic Quantization with Voyage AI Embeddings
description:
AI applications can often start small in terms of compute, data, and
monetary costs. As production applications scale due to increased user
engagement, key factors such as the cost associated with storing and
retrieving large volumes of data become critical optimization
opportunities. These challenges can be addressed by focusing on:

children.text: Step 1: Import required libraries and set the environment variables.
Step 2: Ingest the data into your cluster.
Step 3: Create MongoDB Vector Search indexes on the collection.
Step 4: Define the functions to generate embeddings and query a collection using the MongoDB Vector Search indexes.
Step 5: Run a MongoDB Vector Search query to evaluate the search performance.
Step 6: Measure latency with varying  and  values.
Step 7: Measure the representation capacity and retention.
